goal: seq_frequently_in_real_set(s, a) = forall(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and s.contains(a(k0)) } }

p.c: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Nat -> Real) { forall(x2: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x2 <= k0 and x1(k0) ∈ x0 } } = seq_frequently_in_real_set(x0, x1) }(s, a)
not seq_frequently_in_real_set(s, a) or forall(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and a(k0) ∈ s } } = true
(forall(x0: Nat) { not seq_frequently_in_real_set(s, a) or exists(k0: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and a(k0) ∈ s } })
(forall(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and a(k0) ∈ s } })
not forall(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and a(k0) ∈ s } } or seq_frequently_in_real_set(s, a)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { n0 <= k0 and s.contains(a(k0)) }

exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, eps) }

not seq_in_real_set(s, a) or forall(x0: Nat) { a(x0) ∈ s } = true
(forall(x0: Nat) { not seq_in_real_set(s, a) or a(x0) ∈ s })
(forall(x0: Nat) { a(x0) ∈ s })

function(x0: Nat) { x0 <= x0 }(n_start)
function(x0: Nat) { not (n_start <= x0 and a(x0) ∈ s ∖ Set.singleton(x)) }(n_start)
